review_summary: The live-doc and messaging bundle is traceable, audience-fit, and honest about ProductOS claim boundaries, so it is safe to adopt as the current repo communication surface.

non_blocking_findings: The product docs and messaging docs now describe the same product rather than diverging into separate narratives.
The positioning language stays clear about PM leverage without overstating autonomous capability.
unresolved_questions: Which external publishing surface should be hardened first after the repo-native bundle is adopted?

non_blocking_findings: All new live-doc artifacts and markdown surfaces are wired consistently.
automation_gaps: External publishing adapters are not yet connected to this bundle.

manual_validation_policy.rationale: The bundle shapes stakeholder and market understanding of ProductOS, so targeted PM review remains required even after automated checks pass.

referee_trigger.rationale: The review, test, and manual lanes all converge on proceed with one explicit deferred claim boundary.

next_action: Adopt the live-doc bundle for current ProductOS communication and keep external publishing in a later bounded slice.
